pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: Auto-scaling groups and health checks ensure high availability. Multi-AZ deployment minimizes single points of failure.

pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: Security groups restrict traffic to necessary ports. IAM roles follow least-privilege principle. Encryption at rest and in transit.

pillars.title: Performance
pillars.description: Instance types selected for workload requirements. EBS volumes optimized for IOPS. Monitoring via CloudWatch metrics.

pillars.title: Cost Optimization
pillars.description: Right-sized instances with auto-scaling to match demand. Spot instances available for non-critical workloads.

pillars.title: Operational Excellence
pillars.description: CloudWatch alarms and dashboards for proactive monitoring. Automated patching and updates via SSM.
